name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Jon Ossoff
body:
Help elect Jon Ossoff in GA
---
**Split a donation between Jon Ossoff and the DNC to help elect Jon in Georgia's 6th district and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d0a/1236540147/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Jon-Ossoff-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")****
Friend --

For 38 years, Georgia's 6th congressional district has been a deep shade of red.

That means that after each of the past 20 elections, a Republican has gone to Congress who wouldn't fight for affordable health care, wouldn't stand up to protect the right to vote, and wouldn't demand a fair, livable wage.

On June 20th, we have the chance to change all that by sending Jon Ossoff to Congress. But to break nearly four decades of precedent, he's going to need all the help we can give him.

**[Can you split a $10 donation between Jon Ossoff and the DNC to help elect Democrats in Georgia and all across the country?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d0b/1236540147/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Jon-Ossoff-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+split+a+10+donation+between+Jon+&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")**

I know Jon, and I know he's someone who cares about the people of Georgia's 6th district. He got into this race because he believes, in the words of his mentor John Lewis, in getting in "good trouble" to create change. In a Congress that has become paralyzed by partisan gridlock, I know Jon will be a breath of fresh air.

Jon put up an impressive display is yesterday's primary, but now he needs all of us with him to win again in just 62 days. Pitch in $10 or more today to help elect Jon Ossoff and Democrats like him across the country.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Jon Ossoff for Congress.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d08/1236540147/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-ossoff?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d09/1236540147/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-ossoff?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d16/1236540147/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-ossoff?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d17/1236540147/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-ossoff?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d14/1236540147/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-ossoff?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9e3/4067b0a/2e8ef4ce0/7e756d15/1236540147/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Jon-Ossoff-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&source=em_20170419_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20170419_tp_v1s1")

Tom

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Congresswoman Barbara Comstock Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 12th, 2017

**WARRENTON, VA - **Today, State Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, announced her endorsement by Congresswoman Barbara Comstock of Virginia's Tenth District."Jill Vogel and I have worked together in public service for years," said Congresswoman Barbara Comstock. "Jill is a detail-oriented, problem solver with the utmost passion for serving the public. I am strongly endorsing Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor and look forward to continuing to work with her as a statewide leader on making sound transportation investments, fighting opioid addiction, and seeking innovation in state education. I ask Republicans who want to create jobs, grow our economy, and make our Commonwealth a better place to live, work, and raise a family to join me and vote for Jill Vogel in the Republican primary on June 13th.""I am so thankful for Barbara's support, both in this race and the many years we have worked together on important issues for the Commonwealth," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "Barbara has been a tremendous advocate for Virginia, working on important issues like tax relief for families and businesses, growing the Northern Virginia tech community, securing necessary transportation funding for Virginia roads, collaborating with local, state and federal law enforcement on the opioid addiction epidemic, and passing 21st Century Cures legislation, among many other achievements that help Virginia families."Congresswoman Barbara Comstock represents Virginia's Tenth District in the US House of Representatives. First elected in 2014, her reputation as a problem solver in the House of Delegates has carried through to Congress. In just a few short years, she has already delivered on key promises to relieve congestion on our roadways and increase accountability at Metro while passing legislation to fight opioid addiction and increase womens' achievement in the STEM fields. A believer in giving back, Comstock's Young Womens' Leadership Program provides young women in middle school and high school with the opportunity to meet and interact with women in leadership positions in government, medicine, technology, philanthropy and business.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend,

I'm the proud granddaughter of four immigrants who came to this country from Ireland to seek a better life. They worked hard and built up their communities -- and our country is richer for it.

As new citizens, my grandparents wouldn't have had the success they did without the help of friends, family, and community organizations. **That 's why I'm so committed to supporting organizations like Nationalities Service Center, which since 1921 has helped immigrants and refugees adapt to and prosper in their new lives here in the United States.**

This year, I'm honored to serve on the Host Committee for Nationalities Service Center's annual Global Tastes event. And I'm reaching out to ask for your support. **[Would you be willing to make a donation to help NSC develop resiliency in order to provide vital services to immigrants and refugees in Philadelphia?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5382117282048638976/-4190290490500841472)**

As a nation of immigrants, I believe we are strongest and best equipped to take on the challenges of the 21st century when we embrace our diversity. We can only be united as Americans when we welcome others to our great country.

That's exactly why Nationalities Service Center's work offering comprehensive services including legal protections, community integration, access to health and wellness services, and opportunities to achieve English language proficiency is so important.

**NSC helps immigrants make our nation even stronger -- and they deserve our support.** **[Can I count on you to join me in supporting this vital organization?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5382117282048638976/-4190290490500841472)**

Thank you,
Katie

---

clean_body: Friend, I'm the proud granddaughter of four immigrants who came to this country from Ireland to seek a better life. They worked hard and built up their communities -- and our country is richer for it. As new citizens, my grandparents wouldn't have had the success they did without the help of friends, family, and community organizations. That 's why I'm so committed to supporting organizations like Nationalities Service Center, which since 1921 has helped immigrants and refugees adapt to and prosper in their new lives here in the United States. This year, I'm honored to serve on the Host Committee for Nationalities Service Center's annual Global Tastes event. And I'm reaching out to ask for your support. As a nation of immigrants, I believe we are strongest and best equipped to take on the challenges of the 21st century when we embrace our diversity. We can only be united as Americans when we welcome others to our great country. That's exactly why Nationalities Service Center's work offering comprehensive services including legal protections, community integration, access to health and wellness services, and opportunities to achieve English language proficiency is so important. NSC helps immigrants make our nation even stronger -- and they deserve our support. Thank you, Katie | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

body:
Dear Friend,

I am pleased to announce that I have joined Militia Hill Ventures as a Partner. MHV is a firm founded and led by women focused on starting and growing exceptional life sciences companies. From cancer to cystic fibrosis to central nervous system disorders, MHV has successfully brought forward companies offering promise and relief to families stricken by horrible disease. name: Sen. Ron Wyden (via DSCC.org)
subject: Pass the Presidential Tax Transparency Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
**Trump promised to release his tax returns after the IRS finished their audit. Now he 's saying he won't ever release his returns.**
---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1f8/2b07114c/5f5b1fe1/736c7b62/1990490670/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-tax-returns?source=DPE-20170419-Wyden-ProsHV")**
Team,

During his campaign, Donald Trump promised to release his tax returns after the IRS finished their audit. Now he's saying he won't ever release his returns.

That's a big deal: without Trump's tax returns, we have no way of knowing how he might personally benefit from his tax plans, executive orders, and new bills. It also means we're completely unaware of potential financial interests in Russia and other foreign countries.

That's why I've introduced the Presidential Tax Transparency Act, which would require all sitting presidents and major nominees to release the last three years of their tax returns. It's the bare minimum for transparency from the highest office in our country.

[**Will you add your name to support the Presidential Tax Transparency Act and demand that when millions of Americans file their tax returns this week, Donald Trump should release his own?**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1f8/2b07114c/5f5b1fe1/736c7b62/1990490670/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-tax-returns?source=DPE-20170419-Wyden-ProsHV")

Trump hasn't only broken a 40-year precedent for presidential nominees to release their tax returns -- now he's also broken a major promise he made to the American people on the campaign trail.

Releasing his taxes is the lowest ethical bar for Trump to clear on his business conflicts. Now he's saying he's not even going to jump.

**Trump thinks that the only people who care about his tax returns are journalists. We know that 's not true -- now let's prove it. Add your name right now to support The Presidential Tax Transparency Act:**

[**http://dscc.org/demand-trumps-taxes**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1f8/2b07114c/5f5b1fe1/736c7b62/1990490670/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-tax-returns?source=DPE-20170419-Wyden-ProsHV")

Thank you,

Senator Ron Wyden

Help elect Jon Ossoff in GA.

**Split a donation between Jon Ossoff and the DNC to help elect Jon in Georgia's 6th district and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9f2/4067b0a/2e86a50c9/7e755ea0/3507430139/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Jon-Ossoff-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_rem&source=em_20170419_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170419_tp_rem")****
Friend --

Last night, Jon Ossoff won a commanding victory in Georgia's 6th congressional district.

Now, he's up against Karen Handel, the Republican who finished second, in a runoff election in just 62 days. If she wins, she'll be a rubber stamp for Donald Trump's agenda in Congress.

But if we go all-in and elect Jon, we'll turn Georgia's 6th district blue for the first time in 38 years and send a big, loud message to Donald and the Republicans who are backing him that Democrats are fired up and ready to fight.

**[I'm committed to standing with Jon Ossoff and candidates like him who are fighting for our party's values across the country -- so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to get Jon's back.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9f2/4067b0a/2e86a50c9/7e755ea1/3507430139/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Jon-Ossoff-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Im+committed+to+standing+with+Jon+Ossoff&utm_campaign=em_20170419_tp_rem&source=em_20170419_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170419_tp_rem")**

Jon won an impressive race yesterday, but he needs to do it again and soon, on June 20th. In any election, an early donation goes a lot further than a late one. That's especially true in a race like this one that will happen over just two months.

So let's make sure we're giving Jon everything we've got on the first day of the runoff. Split a $10 donation between Jon's campaign and the DNC right now, and let's turn this red district blue.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: What Georgia means
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e25/738133e4/3329b239/7f85a1ba/502822674/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Dear Friends, As you probably know, the first true referendum on the Trump Administration took place yesterday: a special election in Georgia's 6th congressional district to replace Health & Human Services Secretary Tom Price. I supported Democrat Jon Ossoff, who advanced to the runoff with over 48% of the vote. He has a great shot of pulling off a win in June and sending Trump a message that his divisive agenda is no longer welcome. Also yesterday, I spoke to a group of Miami 8th graders at my alma mater, Palmer Trinity School. And I got a very disturbing question from several of the students there: **Is the President going to take us to war?** We are less than 100 days into this presidency, and already our kids are worried about having Trump at the helm. Unfortunately for us, Trump doesn't seem to have clear foreign policy goals, a guiding set of governing principles, or a desire to build coalitions to get things done. Like the Obamacare repeal debacle and the immigrant ban before it, the President seems to act on a whim and a prayer, untethered to any facts on the ground. **Even middle-schoolers can see it!** If my classroom visit and last night's election results show us anything, it's that Americans of all backgrounds are fed up with the chaos of the Trump Administration. Even in heavily Republican parts of the country like the Atlanta suburbs, voters are ready to put a check on the President's policies -- and push aside the bluster and empty rhetoric. The 2018 midterms can't come soon enough. \-- Patrick _**[P.S. Let's start taking back our country. Chip in $18 right now to help support Democrats up and down the ticket -- from the Senate to the House.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e25/738133e4/3329b239/7f85a1bb/502822674/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170417pem")**_ |

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7f70/24c69fd9/ef9521b8/18e29e80/767458787/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE424N_digital_email_20170419_GA06RapidResponse_inact&source=WQEFE424N_digital_email_20170419_GA06RapidResponse_inact")

Peter,

BIG news from Georgia:

Last night, in a special election to fill a Republican House seat, Democrat Jon Ossoff received **48% of the vote** -- just two points away from winning the race outright. He's now in a runoff to ultimately decide who wins the seat.

Democrats from around the country have been pouring resources into this race: making calls, sending money, and even showing up to knock doors in the district. THAT's how fired up Democrats are.

If our party can pull this off in Georgia, then our chances of flipping a lot of House seats will shoot up. Right now, there are 26 congressional districts that are even bluer than GA-06 but currently represented by a Republican.

**And we want to target as many of them as possible.**

As Georgia has shown us, we can do big things when we have the resources to back up candidates who are ready to run.

**Donate $3 now so we can recruit more pro-choice Democratic candidates to turn red House seats blue:**

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, BIG news from Georgia: Last night, in a special election to fill a Republican House seat, Democrat Jon Ossoff received 48% of the vote -- just two points away from winning the race outright. He's now in a runoff to ultimately decide who wins the seat. Democrats from around the country have been pouring resources into this race: making calls, sending money, and even showing up to knock doors in the district. THAT's how fired up Democrats are. If our party can pull this off in Georgia, then our chances of flipping a lot of House seats will shoot up. Right now, there are 26 congressional districts that are even bluer than GA-06 but currently represented by a Republican. And we want to target as many of them as possible. As Georgia has shown us, we can do big things when we have the resources to back up candidates who are ready to run. name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Live from your living room!
body:
Join us on April 23 for our State of the Revolution livestream
#
Friends,
Our Revolution is thrilled to host an energizing national livestream event to kick off our summer of organizing -- and you're invited! **Join us on April 23 for our State of the Revolution livestream and help grow our movement for the next phase of the political revolution.**
In a showcase of our grassroots organizing efforts since our work officially began last August, we will present our vision to transform American politics and implement our progressive agenda. **To be a part of this, all you have to do is head to our website on Sunday, April 23 at 5 p.m. EDT.**
**[SIGN UP FOR AN EMAIL REMINDER»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ac8/43f17890/dab76591/6203cdbc/811882420/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/state-of-the-revolution-livestream-rsvp/?source=em170419-full")**

Former Ohio State Senator Nina Turner, former NAACP President Ben Jealous, former Nevada State Assemblywoman Lucy Flores, Massachusetts State Representative Mike Connolly and Our Revolution Board Chairman Larry Cohen will lead the livestream. Together, we will:
* Celebrate our victories at the local, state, and national levels
* Outline the integral role you and your community will continue to play in building our movement
* Give local leaders like you the resources and tools you need to take immediate action after the livestream

Our movement has the potential to be the largest force for progressive political action this country has ever seen -- but it will take all of us getting involved at the grassroots for it to be successful. **[Need a reminder to join us on April 23? No problem! Sign up and we'll send you a reminder when it's time to log on to the livestream.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ac8/43f17890/dab76591/6203cdbc/811882420/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/state-of-the-revolution-livestream-rsvp/?source=em170419-full")**
Our political revolution relies on people like you. Your dedication makes our work possible.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
